name: SUFFER
short_description: SUFFER is a brutally difficult retro-styled first person shooter! Become the Spirit of Anarchy and take on the police state in this horror-punk twist on classic PC gaming.
detailed_description:
Are you ready to SUFFER?

SUFFER is a tough-as-nails retro FPS with a horror-punk twist! Become the Spirit of Anarchy and take on the corporate police state with nothing but your ninja sword and a hailstorm of bullets. Fast paced FPS action, wicked parkour platforming, and vicious demonic foes await you in this dystopian nightmare! Deadly traps, aggressive enemies, and abstract level design will take you to hell and back, set to an agonizing melody from punk rock guitars and distorted computer synthesizers! This game is for those in need of a challenging first person experience, reminiscent of the hardcore boomer shooters of yesteryear.

SUFFER HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO ULTIMATE SUFFER!

  • Now includes 3 Intense Single Player Campaigns - SUFFER, SUFFER 2, and FINAL SUFFER!

  • Over 125 Handcrafted "Pick-Up-And-Play" Levels!

  • 3 Difficulty modes - Casual, Normal, and Brutal (for that Hardcore Boom-Shoot itch)

  • Colorful Sprite Graphics Inspired By 90's Pixelated Glory. Chunky Geometry Included!

  • 3 Hours of Original Horror Punk/Metal Soundtrack - recorded with extended range guitars, garage band quality!

Are you badass enough to overcome the demons, or will you succumb to the suffering?
